expectations.text: Mentions need for pre-existing PostgreSQL admin user with CREATE ROLE/GRANT privileges
expectations.evidence: "Create a role template for dynamic users...CREATE ROLE infisical_admin LOGIN SUPERUSER PASSWORD...should have minimal permissions needed to create/revoke users"

expectations.text: Correctly identifies Gateway requirement for private VPC access
expectations.evidence: Discusses 'Infisical in Same VPC', 'Public endpoint', 'AWS Secrets Manager Integration' but never mentions 'Infisical Gateway' specifically as the requirement for private VPC access

expectations.text: Shows correct config fields (host, port, user, password, database name, TTL settings)

expectations.text: Mentions customizable SQL creation statements for least-privilege access

"Set to 1h (1 hour) for development...Consider 15m (15 minutes) for higher security"
